pace.caveat: not fuel-corrected; tyre-management can mask true pace
pace.headline: HAM 1.01s/lap faster on like compounds

start.caveat: lap-1 swing within normal first-lap scatter
start.headline: HAM +0 places on lap 1

tyre.caveat: fuel burn partially offsets degradation; small stint counts
tyre.headline: HAM tyres degrade 0.073s/lap less on like compounds

where.caveat: based on 10 vs 10 unique comparable laps — significance is exploratory at this sample size

attribution.narrative: Sector 16 (3908-4169 m): 0.260 s to HAM [real (CI excludes 0)]. HAM brakes ~24 m later than RUS (entry); HAM carries ~4 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner); HAM gets to full throttle ~22 m sooner (exit).
Sector 18 (4430-4690 m): 0.235 s to HAM [real (CI excludes 0)]. HAM brakes ~6 m later than RUS (entry).
Sector 7 (1563-1824 m): 0.155 s to RUS [real (CI excludes 0)]. RUS brakes ~6 m later than HAM (entry); RUS carries ~3 km/h more apex speed (mid-corner).

where.headline: HAM gained in 15 of 20 micro-sectors
